headline: HP (HPQ) Stock Still Looks Cheap Despite Its 16% Slide
summary: HP stock sits at an interesting point, with the intrinsic value estimate from a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model suggesting a large valuation gap, while the share price reflects a mixed return record over recent years. Over the past 3 years, HP shares are down 16.2%, which means recent holders have not yet seen a strong payoff despite the latest moves. The partnership with OpenAI and focus on AI enabled devices can support expectations for future cash generation, while rising costs and...
